summary: Iteration 148: Travel Page WhatsApp Button, Login Streak Recording, and Mobile Responsiveness - All features verified working

frontend_ui_tests.travel_page_desktop: PASS - Page loads correctly with hero section, travel types, social proof
frontend_ui_tests.travel_page_mobile: PASS - Mobile responsive, no horizontal overflow
frontend_ui_tests.whatsapp_button_mobile: PASS - Button visible at position x=16, y=720
frontend_ui_tests.travel_type_buttons: PASS - All 4 travel types (cab, train, flight, relocation) found

mira_picks_carousel.note: MiraPicksCarousel only shows when user is logged in AND has selected pets in the wizard. This is expected behavior per code: {user && selectedPets.length > 0 && <MiraPicksCarousel />}

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp button correctly implemented with data-testid and wa.me link format
Login streak recording properly integrated in auth_routes.py (lines 343-347)
Travel page is mobile-first responsive with proper layout
MiraPicksCarousel conditional rendering is correct - requires user login AND pet selection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) WhatsApp 'Ask Concierge' button on Travel page with correct data-testid and wa.me link, 2) Login streak recording working - streak is now 1 day after login, 3) Travel page is mobile responsive with no overflow issues. MiraPicksCarousel only appears when user selects pets in the wizard (expected behavior).
